title: Hunter And Hunted
description: Hunter and Hunted makes mobs smarter and deadlier—creepers ambush from cover, skeletons kite you, and Endermen silently stalk if you stare too long. It’s a lightweight plugin that turns survival into a true predator-versus-prey experience.
body:
Hunter and Hunted is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that enhances mob AI to make survival more intense and immersive. Creepers now lie in ambush behind trees or inside tall grass, waiting to strike. Skeletons behave like skilled archers—strafing, retreating, and maintaining distance. If you stare too long at an Enderman, it will silently stalk you, teleporting closer when you’re not looking.

This plugin requires no resource packs or mods and works out-of-the-box with Paper 1.21.4. All features are configurable, including stalk timers, ambush range, and AI toggles. Designed for survival, PvE, hardcore, and horror-themed servers, Hunter and Hunted adds tension and strategy without changing any vanilla mobs or adding new ones.

No commands are required for regular players—it's pure, ambient danger. Optional PlaceholderAPI support is included for custom tracking and display.
